select_controller.description: Multiple unconfigured iZone controllers were found. Select the controller you want to set up.

user.description:
Enter a host/IP to connect using an already discovered controller, or leave it empty to discover via broadcast packets.

Note: iZone setup currently requires broadcast discovery packets from the controller. Please ensure broadcast transport is available between Home Assistant and the iZone controller.

An upcoming version will support direct host onboarding by hostname or IP address.

airflow_max.description: Sets the airflow maximum percent for a zone.
airflow_max.name: Set maximum airflow

airflow_min.description: Sets the airflow minimum percent for a zone.
airflow_min.name: Set minimum airflow
